title: Special Week's Training Log
statement: Special Week has just arrived at Tracen Academy and needs to log her training sessions. Her trainer gives her the following rules:

If the session number is divisible by both 3 and 5, write UmaMusume.
If divisible by 3 only, write Uma.
If divisible by 5 only, write Musume.
Otherwise, write the session number itself.
Given n, print the full training log from session 1 to n.
input_format: The first line contains a single integer t (1 ≤ t ≤ 10<sup>4</sup>), the number of test cases.
Each test case contains a single integer n.
output_format: For each test case, print n lines according to the rules above.

samples.label: Sample 1
samples.output:
1
2
Uma
4
Musume
Uma
7
8
Uma
Musume
11
Uma
13
14
UmaMusume
